channel.title: Advocacy on cekrem.github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Advocacy on cekrem.github.io

item.title: The FP Article I Can't Seem to Finish
item.description:
I’ve been trying to write an article about why developers should learn functional programming. I have three drafts. In Norwegian, for some reason. None of them are good enough to publish.

I believe the argument. Spent the last year proving it to myself with an Elm book, 125,000+ lines of production Elm, a subtle mindset switch towards F#, and a whole SOLID-in-FP blog series. But every draft I write sounds like a sales pitch, and I can’t make myself hit publish.
